title: CommonsV2 NPC terrain passability + wandering blurbs

log.context: CommonsV2 NPC terrain passability + wandering blurbs

Both servers are healthy. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

## Summary

### Issue 1: NPC terrain passability

**Root cause:** The server's `map.ts` used completely different map dimensions (25×19 tiles @ 32px) from the client (50×35 tiles @ 20px). NPCs were navigating a phantom obstacle map that bore no relation to what players saw. The comment in `game-loop.ts` even acknowledged this, but the fix was never applied.

**Fix in `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/`:**
- `map.ts`: Changed `CHUNK_T...(truncated)
